en: Here's why I f***ed up. You know, like 30 years ago,
way back when I was still in high school,
this new chick moved to town.
I swear to God, I looked at her, I had a heart attack.
I mean, I was thunderstruck.
I immediately fell in love with her.
And of course it didn't work out.
And I thought about her every f***ing day
for the next 25 years.
So one day I'm at a bar and I'm telling my buddy about it.
And he goes, oh yeah, she broke your heart?
She broke up with you?
I said, no.
And he goes, oh, did you break up with her?
I said, no.
I go, I never even talked to her.
And he just starts f***ing laughing.
Wait a minute, some chick broke your heart
that you never even talked to?
And I was like, yeah.
And he's just crying, laughing, punching the bar.
And I'm like, what?
He goes, buddy, if you never even talked to her,
for all you know, she could have been a c***.
And I never thought about her again.
So my point is, if you see some woman
and she makes your heart stop,
you gotta go up and take in that bat.
You know, you gotta find out if she's a c*** or not.
